domain: Russian banya birch venik (sauna ritual): high-heat steam room + rhythmic birch-leaf venik slap drives steam to body + alternating heat / cold plunge cycle drives vasodilation-vasoconstriction circulation pump.
specific_mechanism: REVERSIBLE oscillation between two extreme states drives transport via pumping; both directions equally useful; cycle itself does the work.
llm_application: VENIK-OSCILLATION reverse-direction alternating activation pulse: during fine-tune, alternate every M=10 steps between (A) STANDARD forward pass and (B) REVERSED-SIGN intermediate activations forward pass (multiply pre-norm hidden states by -1 in every other layer). Compute gradient in both modes; average parameter updates with weights (1-λ, λ), λ=0.3. Excites both directions of loss surface symmetrically. Differs from (a) standard fine-tune (single direction), (b) cyclic LR (varies magnitude not sign), (c) Optimizer-Induced Drift Transverse Dynamics 2602.23696 (ANALYZES natural oscillation, doesn't IMPOSE), (d) SAM sharpness-aware (no sign alternation) by combining (i) ALTERNATING sign-flipped activations + (ii) WEIGHTED update average + (iii) FIXED M-step cadence.
novelty_claim: Cyclic LR varies magnitude. SAM uses adversarial perturbation. 2602.23696 analyzes transverse dynamics. VENIK-OSCILLATION recombines (a) IMPOSED sign-flip alternation + (b) WEIGHTED average update + (c) FIXED M-cadence. Three known components combined; not wholly new.
content_words: weighted average parameter update across signs

llm_side: weighted average parameter update across signs
